allow: Bash(git add docs/plans/2026-02-28-extract-command-group-impl.md && git commit -m "Add implementation plan for extract command group rework")

Bash(cat > /Users/phildini/code/civicband/clerk/tests/test_extract_cli.py << 'PYEOF'
"""Tests for clerk.extract_cli module."""

from click.testing import CliRunner

from clerk.extract_cli import extract


class TestExtractCommandGroup:
    """Tests for the extract command group."""

    def test_extract_group_exists\(self\):
        """The extract command group should exist."""
        runner = CliRunner\(\)
        result = runner.invoke\(extract, ["--help"]\)
        assert result.exit_code == 0
        assert "entities" in result.output
        assert "votes" in result.output
        assert "all" in result.output

    def test_entities_subcommand_requires_subdomain_or_next_site\(self\):
        """entities subcommand should error without --subdomain or --next-site."""
        runner = CliRunner\(\)
        result = runner.invoke\(extract, ["entities"]\)
        assert result.exit_code != 0

    def test_votes_subcommand_requires_subdomain_or_next_site\(self\):
        """votes subcommand should error without --subdomain or --next-site."""
        runner = CliRunner\(\)
        result = runner.invoke\(extract, ["votes"]\)
        assert result.exit_code != 0

    def test_all_subcommand_requires_subdomain_or_next_site\(self\):
        """all subcommand should error without --subdomain or --next-site."""
        runner = CliRunner\(\)
        result = runner.invoke\(extract, ["all"]\)
        assert result.exit_code != 0
PYEOF)

Bash(git add src/clerk/cli.py tests/test_cli.py tests/test_workers.py && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Register extract group, remove old extract-entities and fix-extraction-stage commands

- Add extract command group import and registration in cli.py
- Remove extract_entities command and extract_entities_internal function
- Remove fix_extraction_stage one-time migration command
- Simplify build_db_from_text command \(remove --extract-entities and --ignore-cache flags\)
- Remove TestExtractEntities test class \(tests old removed command\)
- Update workers test mocks to use create=True for removed function
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add src/clerk/extract_cli.py tests/test_extract_cli.py && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Implement extraction orchestration in extract_cli.py

Add _run_extraction_for_site\(\) that orchestrates entity/vote extraction
across page files with caching support. Updates entities, votes, and all
subcommands to call the orchestration function instead of echo placeholders.
Adds TestRunExtraction test class covering cache creation, rebuild mode,
and cross-section cache preservation.
EOF
\)")
Bash(git add src/clerk/extract_cli.py tests/test_extract_cli.py && git commit --amend --no-edit)

Bash(git add src/clerk/utils.py tests/test_utils.py tests/test_utils_refactor.py && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Simplify build_table_from_text to read-only cache, remove inline extraction

Remove batch_parse_with_spacy, process_page_for_db, extract_and_cache, and
SPACY_CHUNK_SIZE from utils.py. DB compilation is now a pure data-assembly
step that reads cached extraction results but never runs extraction itself.
Pages without cached results get empty entities/votes.

build_db_from_text_internal accepts **kwargs for backward compatibility
with callers that still pass extract_entities/ignore_cache \(to be cleaned
up in a follow-up\).
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add src/clerk/workers.py tests/test_workers.py && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Remove dormant extraction pipeline code from workers.py

- Remove extraction_job function entirely
- Clean up ocr_complete_coordinator: remove commented-out extraction queue
  and Path 2 block, remove extraction_total from progress update
- Simplify db_compilation_job signature to \(subdomain, run_id=None\)
- Remove all extract_entities/ignore_cache references from compilation logging
- Update tests to match simplified signatures
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh pr create --title "Rework entity/vote extraction into standalone command group" --body "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- New `clerk extract` command group with `entities`, `votes`, and `all` subcommands, each supporting `--subdomain`, `--next-site`, and `--rebuild` flags
- Removed inline extraction from `build-db-from-text` — DB compilation now reads cached `.extracted.json` files but never runs extraction itself
- Removed dormant `extraction_job` from RQ pipeline and commented-out extraction enqueuing from `ocr_complete_coordinator`
- Removed `fix-extraction-stage` one-time migration command

## Test Plan
- [x] All 302 tests pass \(23 skipped\)
- [x] `clerk extract --help` shows entities, votes, all subcommands
- [x] `clerk extract entities --help` shows --subdomain, --next-site, --rebuild
- [x] `clerk build-db-from-text --help` has no --extract-entities or --ignore-cache flags
- [x] No stale references to removed code in src/clerk/
- [ ] Manual test: run `clerk extract entities -s <subdomain>` on a real site
- [ ] Manual test: run `clerk build-db-from-text -s <subdomain>` and verify cached entities are included
EOF
\)")
